verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, let the Son of God enfold you with His Spirit and His love, Let Him fill your heart and satisfy your soul; Oh, let Him have the things that hold you, And His Spirit like a dove wil descend upon your life, And make you whole.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, oh Jesus, Come and fill Your lambs. Jesus, oh Jesus, Come and fill Your lambs.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O come and sing this song with gladness As your hearts are filled with joy Lift your hands in sweet surrender to His name O give Him all your tears and sadness Give Him all your years of pain And you'll enter into life in Jesus' name
